reason: No controlled frontier benchmark with positive duration, positive/explicitly-unavailable token metrics, matched control/treatment rows, and statistical confidence was found. The inspected guild-benchmark control artifact is zero-duration/zero-token and cannot support a frontier-better-than claim.

inspected_artifacts.why_invalid: duration_seconds=0.0 and tokens_used=0/token_delta=0 make this a smoke/control artifact, not comparative outcome evidence.

required_before_any_frontier_claim: randomized control/treatment or baseline/treatment arms on the same tasks
verified success/time/token metrics with non-null deltas or explicit token-unavailable marker
confidence interval or statistical confidence report
